widgets.name: AnalogClockWidget
widgets.description: Classic circular clock face with hour, minute, and second hands.

widgets.name: DigitalClockWidget
widgets.description: Bold digital time display with optional blinking colon, date, and AM/PM badge.

widgets.name: FlipClockWidget
widgets.description: Retro split-flap style clock with dark cards and horizontal dividers.

widgets.name: MinimalTextClockWidget
widgets.description: Spells out the time in natural English with optional greeting and numeric reference.
